label: Leads & AI Estimates
info: Consolidated leads webhook pipelines and BidAgent estimation. Stacked vertically: CurbClass Leads (top), ChassisShield Leads (middle), BidAgent Standalone & Price Book Proxy (bottom).

🏡 SECTION 1: CurbClass Lead Ingest & AI Estimate
nodes.info:
Handles inbound webhooks from the CurbClass contact form (/api/curbclass/contact).

Syncs contacts/opportunities to Twenty CRM, uploads photos, calls the BidAgent AI for estimation, and emails the results via Resend.

nodes.name: 🛡️ SECTION 2: ChassisShield Lead Ingest & Waitlist Sync
nodes.info:
Handles inbound webhooks from the ChassisShield contact form (/api/chassisshield/contact).

Syncs contacts/opportunities to Twenty CRM, formats waitlist notes, creates follow-up tasks, and pushes alerts to Gotify.

nodes.name: 🤖 SECTION 3: Standalone BidAgent Webhook & Price Book Proxy
nodes.info: Provides the /api/curbclass/bidagent/pricebook proxy to translate CRM services to BidAgent keys, and hosts the standalone estimate request endpoint (/api/curbclass/bidagent/estimate).

nodes.name: 📝 General Inquiry Route Handler
nodes.info:
Splits a general inquiry lead into two parallel tracks:
1. Email path: formats and fires the inquiry receipt/alert email via HTTP API.
2. CRM/Gotify path: routes the lead payload into the CRM Upsert + Note/Task link flow and Gotify notification.

nodes.name: 📝 Estimate Route Handler
nodes.info:
Inspects the BidAgent estimate output:
- If successful: sends the customer quote email, patches the CRM Opportunity stage to Meeting, creates Note + Task links, and alerts Gotify.
- If rejected: skips email/stage update, registers rejection in CRM & Gotify.
- If failed/timeout: falls back to a general inquiry receipt & triggers admin Gotify alerts.

nodes.name: ⚠️ Unified Lead Error Catch-All
nodes.info:
Catches any unhandled errors that occur during the Lead Ingest, CRM mapping, or BidAgent workflow.

Frees the browser page with a fallback HTTP response and triggers a backup email containing the raw lead data so no inquiries are lost.

nodes.name: Clean Email Request
